jobs.name: Post-Restart Resume
jobs.description: Immediately after the 4 AM restart, check MEMORY.md for active tasks and resume them
jobs.prompt: Gateway just restarted. Follow AGENTS.md § Task Persistence → On startup: read MEMORY.md Active Tasks, resume active ones, skip paused. Respect quiet hours.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.description: Daily morning summary of emails, tasks, and overnight events
jobs.prompt: Morning briefing: summarize unread emails (both Gmail and Yahoo), list today's calendar events, report any overnight errors, and include status of any active tasks from MEMORY.md. Send via WhatsApp.

jobs.name: Email Triage
jobs.description: Periodic email inbox check and triage
jobs.prompt: Check email on both Gmail and Yahoo (see TOOLS.md § Email Access). Flag urgent messages, draft routine replies. Only notify user if something needs attention.

jobs.name: System Health
jobs.description: Periodic system and gateway health check
jobs.prompt: Run a system health check: verify gateway status, check disk space, review recent error logs. Only notify me if something is wrong.
